# ChainStream

> AI-native on-chain data infrastructure providing real-time trading data,
> token analytics, wallet profiling, and DeFi execution capabilities
> across Solana, Ethereum, and BSC.

## Core Capabilities
- [REST API Reference](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/api-reference/authentication/authenticate): 56 REST endpoints for token, trade, wallet, ranking, KYT, webhook data
- [GraphQL API](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/graphql/getting-started/overview): OLAP analytical GraphQL with 11 data Cubes, filtering, aggregation
- [GraphQL IDE](https://ide.chainstream.io): Browser-based query editor with templates, auto-complete, code export
- [WebSocket Streaming](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/data-concepts/realtime-streaming): Real-time price, trade, and wallet data via WebSocket
- [MCP Server](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/ai-infrastructure/mcp-server/introduction): 50+ tools for AI agent integration via Model Context Protocol
- [Agent Skills](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/ai-infrastructure/agent-skills/introduction): Structured AI capability packages for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex
- [CLI](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/cli/overview): Command-line tool for data queries and DeFi execution
- [SDKs](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/sdks/overview): TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust client libraries

## Supported Chains
- Solana (`sol`), Ethereum (`eth`), BSC (`bsc`)
- DEXes: Jupiter, Raydium, PumpFun, Moonshot, Candy (Solana), KyberSwap (Ethereum/BSC)

## Choosing an API
- [API Comparison](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/getting-started/api-comparison): REST vs GraphQL vs WebSocket vs MCP — when to use each

## Protocol Guides
- [Pump.fun Guide](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/playbooks/protocols/pump-fun): Token discovery, pricing, trades, holders, creation on Pump.fun
- [Raydium Guide](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/playbooks/protocols/raydium): DEX trades, liquidity pools, OHLCV on Raydium

## GraphQL Data Cubes
- DEXTrades, Transfers, BalanceUpdates, DEXPools, TokenSupplyUpdates
- OHLC, TokenTradeStats, PoolLiquiditySnapshots
- TokenHolders, WalletTokenPnL, TokenMarketCap, TokenSearch

## Pricing
- [Pricing](https://chainstream.io/pricing): API Key subscriptions and x402 micropayment (pay-per-query)
- [x402 Payment](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/getting-started/x402-payments): Pay with USDC via x402 protocol

## Getting Started
- [Quick Start](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/getting-started/quickstart): First API call in 5 minutes
- [Choosing Your Path](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/getting-started/choosing-your-path): Select the right learning path
- [MCP Setup](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/ai-infrastructure/mcp-server/setup-guide): One-line Claude/Cursor integration
- [CLI Setup](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/guides/cli/overview): `npx @chainstream-io/cli login` to start
